category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Tunisia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入突尼斯：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入突尼西亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China GB/T EV conductive charging documentation against Tunisia INNORPI / IEC references, STEG grid-connection expectations, 50 Hz electrical assumptions, and EV policy context.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国GB/T电动汽车传导充电文件与突尼斯INNORPI/IEC参考、STEG并网要求、50Hz电气假设及电动汽车政策背景差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國GB/T電動汽車傳導充電文件與突尼西亞INNORPI/IEC參考、STEG併網要求、50Hz電氣假設及電動汽車政策背景差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INNORPI scope determination, STEG grid-connection approval, electrical-installation approval, customs determination, tax determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Tunisia standards, electrical safety, utility, grid, import, tax, and local permit requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INNORPI适用范围裁定、STEG并网批准、电气安装批准、海关裁定、税务裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行突尼斯标准、电气安全、公用事业、电网、进口、税务及地方许可要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INNORPI適用範圍裁定、STEG併網批准、電氣安裝批准、海關裁定、稅務裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行突尼西亞標準、電氣安全、公用事業、電網、進口、稅務及地方許可要求。

answer_first.en: For EV chargers exported from China to Tunisia, GB/T 18487 and GB/T 20234 evidence is useful but should not be presented as automatically equivalent to Tunisia acceptance. The practical gaps are INNORPI or buyer use of IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 references, connector interoperability, STEG connection and installation review, 50 Hz configuration, and the fact that Tunisia EV policy incentives do not by themselves create a single charger type-approval route.
answer_first.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩出口突尼斯时，GB/T 18487和GB/T 20234证据有参考价值，但不应表述为自动等同于突尼斯认可。实际差距包括INNORPI或买方采用IEC 61851/IEC 62196参考、连接器互操作性、STEG接入和安装审查、50Hz配置，以及突尼斯电动汽车政策激励本身并不等于统一的充电桩型式批准路径。
answer_first.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁出口突尼西亞時，GB/T 18487和GB/T 20234證據有參考價值，但不應表述為自動等同於突尼西亞認可。實際差距包括INNORPI或買方採用IEC 61851/IEC 62196參考、連接器互操作性、STEG接入和安裝審查、50Hz配置，以及突尼西亞電動汽車政策激勵本身並不等於統一的充電樁型式批准路徑。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, tax authority, electrical-safety authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
